segments.text: Well, that's a bold aggressive play from Ras's perspective
segments.original_text: まあ、あえての強気なアタックっていうのが、ラス側の視点になりますもんね

segments.text: But Sonic's down to his last stock and getting pressured
segments.original_text: しかし、最終ストックのザ・ソニックを追い詰めている

segments.text: He flips to barely avoid, but with the directional airdodge...
segments.original_text: 体を翻して何とか回避、しかし移動回避なので

segments.text: Landing lag! Miya with the follow-up!
segments.original_text: 着地硬直に、ミヤの追撃!

segments.text: Chef forward tilt off the ledge!

full_text: Well, that's a bold aggressive play from Ras's perspective But Sonic's down to his last stock and getting pressured Ooh, forward smash! He flips to barely avoid, but with the directional airdodge... Landing lag! Miya with the follow-up! Chef forward tilt off the ledge!
